temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man in a light blue shirt and dark tie sits in an office chair, his head tilted back as he closes his eyes. He appears to be in a state of deep thought or distress, with a faint, pained expression on his face. The background is blurred, showing horizontal blinds casting horizontal shadows across the wall. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and contemplative mood, introducing a character who is clearly troubled or under stress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, heightening the tension.)
(00:04-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of a silver flip phone resting on a desk. The phone is open, revealing a photo of a man with a distinctive red mohawk and a red bandana. The name '小虎' (Tiger) is visible on the screen next to the photo. (Storyline: This cutaway introduces a key element: a photo of a man named Tiger. The connection between this photo and the distressed man from the previous scene is implied, suggesting Tiger is a significant figure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues from the previous scene.)
